subject: (no subject)
body:
I brought Stephanie to Boston so you and I could try
to have FUN... WHen I asked if you wanted to play..
you said no... do you want to watch   you said no....
I could have left her home... I don't need more
passengers that I need to be concerned,, di they eat
,,, did they have something to do.. then only late in
the evening ,, you say  I changed my mind.. It would
have been helpful had you asked Sarah,, what does
someone who travels with me have to do.. a copy of my
daily schedule and contact numbers would have gotten
me home four hours earlier, a facial or massage could
have been organized... you looked at my nails , and I
said they need to be done.. at the end of the day,,  
IT was if I traveld by myself,

__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
